---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement", "needs discussion"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Why does this matter?
     e.g. "As a user, I find it frustrating when I have to X because..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as you can. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any other approaches? Why do you prefer your proposed solution? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any mockups, references, links to related issues, or other context here. -->

## Are you willing to contribute this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this and open a PR.
- [ ] I can help test and review, but not implement.
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting it.
